project.name: Ollie - Pure JavaScript JPEG Codec
project.description: A comprehensive JPEG encoder and decoder with advanced features

file.name: main.js
file.description: Minimal entry point - initializes UI modules and starts the application.

file.name: tabs.js
file.description: Tab switching logic for encoder/decoder views.

file.name: encoder-ui.js
file.description: Encoder UI logic and event handlers.

file.name: decoder-ui.js
file.description: Decoder UI logic and event handlers.

file.name: jpeg-encoder.js
file.description: High-level JPEG encoder orchestrator supporting baseline and progressive encoding.
file.class: <method name="encode" params="imageData, options" return="Promise" description="Encodes RGBA image data into JPEG format. Internally uses tuple-based embedSecretData for steganography." /> <method name="encodeCoefficients" params="coefficients, quantizationTables, options" return="Promise" description="Re-encodes from raw DCT coefficients for lossless transcoding." />

file.name: jpeg-decoder.js
file.description: High-level JPEG decoder orchestrator supporting baseline and progressive decoding. Returns [result, error] tuples.
file.class: <method name="decode" params="jpegData, options" return="Promise<[result, null] | [null, Error]>" description="Decodes JPEG data into RGBA format. Wraps parseFileStructure in try/catch. Accepts options.coefficientsOnly to skip pixel reconstruction." />

file.name: jpeg-transcoder.js
file.description: Updates steganography data in JPEG files WITHOUT generation loss. Returns [result, error] tuples.
file.class: <method name="updateSecret" params="jpegBytes, newSecretData, options" return="Promise<[Uint8Array, null] | [null, Error]>" description="Updates steganography data in a JPEG (lossless). Returns tuple." />

file.name: colorspace.js
file.description: RGB to YCbCr color space conversion.

function.name: rgbToYCbCr
function.description: Converts RGB values to YCbCr color space.

file.name: blocks.js
file.description: Handles image padding and extraction of 8x8 pixel blocks. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: padDimensions
function.description: Calculates new dimensions padded to multiples of 8.

function.name: padDimensions420
function.description: Calculates new dimensions padded to multiples of 16 for 4:2:0 subsampling.

function.name: extractBlock
function.description: Extracts an 8x8 block from the flattened image data.

file.name: colorspace.js
file.description: RGB/YCbCr color space conversion. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: rgbToYcbcr
function.description: Converts RGB to YCbCr using JFIF standard formulas.

function.name: ycbcrToRgb
function.description: Converts YCbCr to RGB using JFIF standard formulas.

file.name: downsampling.js
file.description: Chroma downsampling for 4:2:0 encoding. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: downsampleBlock420
function.params: source, srcWidth, srcX, srcY, imgWidth, imgHeight
function.description: Downsample a 16x16 chroma region to 8x8 using box filter averaging.

function.name: extractLumaBlocks420
function.params: yChannel, srcWidth, srcX, srcY, imgWidth, imgHeight
function.description: Extract 4 luma blocks from a 16x16 MCU region.

file.name: dct.js
file.description: Implements the Forward Discrete Cosine Transform (FDCT). Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: forwardDCT
function.description: Performs 2D FDCT on an 8x8 block (alias for forwardDCTNaive).

function.name: forwardDCTNaive
function.description: Naive separable FDCT implementation.

function.name: forwardDCTAAN
function.description: AAN (Arai, Agui, Nakajima) fast FDCT implementation.

file.name: quantization.js
file.description: Defines quantization tables and applies quantization. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: quantize
function.description: Divides DCT coefficients by the quantization table.

function.name: getScaledQuantizationTables
function.description: Computes quality-scaled quantization tables (IJG algorithm). Cached.

file.name: zigzag.js
file.description: Implements ZigZag reordering of quantized coefficients. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: zigZag
function.description: Reorders 8x8 block into 1D array using ZigZag pattern.

file.name: huffman.js
file.description: Implements Huffman entropy coding. encodeBlock returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: computeCategory
function.description: Computes the SSSS category for a value.

function.name: getBitRepresentation
function.description: Computes the bit representation of a value within its category.

function.name: encodeBlock
function.params: block, previousDC, writer, dcTable, acTable, Ss, Se
function.description: Encodes a single block using Huffman tables. Returns DC value as tuple.

file.name: progressive-encoding.js
file.description: Implements progressive JPEG multi-scan encoding.

file.name: spiff-generation.js
file.description: Generates SPIFF (APP8) markers for JPEG files.

file.name: quantization-parser.js
file.description: Parses DQT segments. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: parseQuantizationTable
function.description: Parses single quantization table from DQT segment.

function.name: parseAllQuantizationTables
function.description: Parses all tables from a DQT segment.

function.name: parseQuantizationTablesFromSegments
function.description: Parses tables from multiple DQT segments.

file.name: huffman-parser.js
file.description: Parses DHT segments. Returns [result, error] tuples.

method.name: constructor
method.description: Builds optimized lookup table from BITS and HUFFVAL arrays.

method.name: decode
method.description: Decodes next symbol via optimized 16-bit LUT.

function.name: parseHuffmanTable
function.description: Parses single Huffman table from DHT segment.

function.name: parseAllHuffmanTables
function.description: Parses all tables from a DHT segment.

function.name: parseHuffmanTablesFromSegments
function.description: Parses tables from multiple DHT segments.

file.name: huffman-decode-optimized.js
file.description: Optimized Huffman decoding (O(1) via 16-bit LUT). Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: buildOptimizedLookup
function.description: Builds 16-bit Uint16Array lookup table.

function.name: decodeOptimized
function.description: Decodes symbol using direct array lookup.

file.name: frame-parser.js
file.description: Parses SOF0 frame header. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: parseFrameHeader
function.description: Extracts image dimensions, components, and sampling factors.

file.name: scan-parser.js
file.description: Parses SOS scan header. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: parseScanHeader
function.description: Extracts scan parameters and component-to-table mappings.

file.name: huffman-decoder.js
file.description: Decodes Huffman-encoded bitstream into quantized coefficients. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: decodeBlock
function.description: Decodes one 8x8 block of quantized coefficients.

function.name: decodeDC
function.description: Decodes DC coefficient with differential coding.

function.name: decodeAC
function.description: Decodes AC coefficients with run-length encoding.

file.name: inverse-zigzag.js
file.description: Converts 1D coefficient array to 8x8 2D block. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: inverseZigZag
function.description: Reorders 1D array into 8x8 block.

file.name: dequantization.js
file.description: Multiplies quantized coefficients by quantization table. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: dequantize
function.description: Reverses quantization by multiplication.

function.name: dequantizeBypass
function.description: Bypass dequantization for debugging.

file.name: idct.js
file.description: IDCT implementations (naive + AAN). Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: idct
function.description: 2D IDCT using cosine tables.

function.name: idctNaive
function.description: Alias for idct (naive O(N³)).

function.name: idctAAN
function.description: Optimized AAN IDCT (O(N)).

file.name: idct-spec.js
file.description: Reference IDCT implementations from T.81 specification. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: idctPureRef
function.description: Pure reference IDCT from T.81.

function.name: idctOptimizedRef
function.description: Optimized separable 1D IDCT.

function.name: idctFastAAN
function.description: Fast AAN algorithm (in-place).

file.name: colorspace-decoder.js
file.description: Converts YCbCr to RGB color space.

function.name: ycbcrToRgb
function.description: Converts YCbCr values to RGB (0-255).

file.name: upsampling.js
file.description: Upsamples subsampled chroma components.

function.name: upsample
function.description: Upsamples component using bilinear interpolation.

file.name: block-assembly.js
file.description: Assembles decoded 8x8 blocks into full image.

function.name: assembleImage
function.description: Combines blocks into final RGBA image.

file.name: progressive-decoding.js
file.description: Implements progressive JPEG multi-scan decoding.

file.name: spiff-parser.js
file.description: Parses SPIFF (APP8) markers. Returns [result, error] tuples.

function.name: parseSpiffHeader
function.description: Parses SPIFF header from APP8 segment data.

file.name: index.js
file.description: Public API for steganography module.

file.name: jsteg.js
file.description: Core steganography implementation using DCT coefficient modification.

file.name: f5.js
file.description: F5 steganography algorithm with matrix encoding. Supports container format embedding/extraction with ECC.

file.name: container-format.js
file.description: Structured container format for steganographic payloads. Returns [result, error] tuples.

file.name: chunk-manager.js
file.description: Manages data chunking, splitting, and reassembly across multiple files. Returns [result, error] tuples.

file.name: error-correction.js
file.description: Wrapper for Reed-Solomon error correction integration. Returns [result, error] tuples.

file.name: batch-embedder.js
file.description: Embeds data across multiple images with capacity-aware chunking. Returns [result, error] tuples.
file.class: <method name="embed" params="data, imageFiles, options, onProgress" return="Promise<[Array<{name, data}>, null] | [null, Error]>" description="Embeds data across multiple images. Returns tuple of output files array." />

file.name: batch-extractor.js
file.description: Extracts and reassembles data from multiple images. Returns [result, error] tuples.
file.class: <method name="extract" params="imageFiles, password, onProgress" return="Promise<[{data, filename, metadata}, null] | [null, Error]>" description="Extracts and reassembles data from multiple images. Returns tuple." />

file.name: index.js
file.description: Public API for EC module.

file.name: galois-field.js
file.description: Galois Field (GF) arithmetic - GenericGF and GenericGFPoly classes.

file.name: reed-solomon.js
file.description: Reed-Solomon encoder and decoder implementations.

file.name: reedsolomon.js
file.description: Backward compatibility re-export (delegates to index.js).

directory.name: crypto
directory.description: Cryptography utilities. All functions return [result, error] tuples.

file.name: index.js
file.description: Public API for crypto module.

file.name: encryption.js
file.description: AES-GCM encryption/decryption. Returns [result, error] tuples.

file.name: key-derivation.js
file.description: PBKDF2-based key derivation. Returns [key, error] tuples.

file.name: vault-manager.js
file.description: Core vault management. Immutable state machine — all mutating methods return [newVault, error] tuples.

method.name: constructor
method.description: Initializes vault with explicit state. Defaults to empty, locked.

method.name: addEntry
method.description: Returns new vault with appended entry. Original is unchanged.

method.name: updateEntry
method.description: Returns new vault with updated entry. Original is unchanged.

method.name: deleteEntry
method.description: Returns new vault without specified entry. Original is unchanged.

method.name: search
method.description: Filters entries by text query and exact tag match. Pure read-only.

method.name: toJSON
method.description: Serializes entries and metadata for storage.

method.name: fromJSON
method.description: Static. Rehydrates vault from storage. Returns tuple.

method.name: lock
method.description: Returns new locked vault with master password cleared.

file.name: outline.xml
file.description: Project structure and component overview (this file).

file.name: test-outline.xml
file.description: Test suite structure and component overview.

file.name: testing-specs.xml
file.description: Documentation for the testing framework.

file.name: modern-jpeg-spec.xml
file.description: JPEG specification reference and implementation notes.

file.name: AAN-algo-spec.xml
file.description: Fast AAN IDCT algorithm specification.

file.name: constitution.md
file.description: Project mission, identity, and architectural philosophy.

file.name: test-specs.md
file.description: Comprehensive list of testing rules and philosophy (PBT, TDD, environment parity).

file.name: code-quality.md
file.description: Rules surrounding Javascript constraints, patterns, and safety (tuple returns, determinism, dead code).

file.name: bit-writer.js
file.description: Helper class for writing variable-length bit sequences.

method.name: flush
method.description: Flushes pending bits and returns the final byte array.

file.name: bit-core.js
file.description: Pure, side-effect-free bitwise operations. Core functions (readBit, readBits, peekBits, peek16Bits, handleByteStuffing) accept explicit state and return [value, newByteOffset, newBitOffset, error] tuples.

file.name: bit-reader.js
file.description: Stateful wrapper that delegates to the optimized BitReader.

method.name: constructor
method.description: Initializes reader with byte array, always uses optimized implementation.

file.name: bit-reader-optimized.js
file.description: Optimized BitReader with direct byte manipulation. Delegates to bit-core.js pure functions.

file.name: marker-parser.js
file.description: Parses JPEG file structure and extracts segments.

function.name: findNextMarker
function.description: Locates next 0xFFxx marker.

function.name: readMarkerSegment
function.description: Extracts segment payload.

function.name: parseFileStructure
function.description: Builds map of all segments in file.

directory.name: test
directory.description: Test suite. See src/specs/test-outline.xml for detailed structure.

step.name: Preprocessing
step.description: Image data is padded to multiples of 8 and converted from RGB to YCbCr.

step.name: DCT
step.description: Forward DCT converts spatial data to frequency domain.

step.name: Quantization
step.description: Frequency coefficients are divided by quantization tables to reduce precision.

step.name: ZigZag
step.description: 2D block is flattened to 1D array in zigzag order.

step.name: Entropy Coding
step.description: Run-length encoding and Huffman coding are applied.

step.name: File Assembly
step.description: Headers (SOI, DQT, SOF0, DHT, SOS) and scan data are combined into the final JPEG file.

feature.name: Baseline JPEG
feature.description: Standard sequential DCT-based JPEG encoding and decoding.

feature.name: Progressive JPEG
feature.description: Multi-scan progressive encoding and decoding support.

feature.name: Multi-File Sharding
feature.description: Data splitting across multiple JPEG files.

feature.name: Password Vault
feature.description: Immutable state machine password manager with PBT-validated serialization.

feature.name: Property-Based Testing
feature.description: Custom PBT harness for fuzzing crypto, chunk, and vault invariants.

rules.rule: No Dependencies or Third-Party Libraries — code must be built entirely in plain JavaScript.
Defensive Programming — functions must explicitly validate parameters and structure (e.g., verifying JPEG signatures fail-fast).
Environment Agnosticism — core components must execute uniformly on browser engines and Node.js.
Test-Driven Development (TDD) — code design must be guided by tests establishing expected behavior.
Property-Based Security — security and robustness must be validated algorithmically against auto-generated invariant tests.
